Chrono Siege Codex Age-of-War experiment
Dawn Age Train, survive, evolve.
Enemy: Dawn Age Scouts are gathering at the far citadel.
Tower Gridlock / 2026 Codex

Chrono Siege

This is the Codex slot gone off-script: an Age of War style lane battle. Train units, hold the line, mount turrets, evolve through four eras, and crack the enemy citadel before its timeline overtakes yours.

Living erasStone, Iron, Steam, and Neon each repaint the world, bases, units, turrets, and special attack.
Readable armiesGenerated unit sprites define each era, with distinct silhouettes, weapons, hit flashes, and attack tells.
Base warfareTrain a frontline, use specials at the right moment, then evolve or invest in turret defense.
Timeline sealed

Victory

The rival citadel has fallen.

Field note: Do not spam only the cheapest unit. Ranged lines melt unsupported, heavies need bodies in front, and evolving heals your base while unlocking stronger silhouettes and specials.
